=== Quick Fix Inventory ===

[D1] (9:14-9:30) TS377047: This expression can be rewritten in the reusable function form `Effect.fn("withSpanFunction")(function*(n) { ... })`. effect(effectFnOpportunity)
  Fix 0: "Disable effectFnOpportunity for this line"
  Fix 1: "Disable effectFnOpportunity for entire file"
  Fix 2: "Convert to Effect.fn (with span from withSpan)"

[D2] (10:3-12:5) TS377017: This Effect.gen contains a single return statement. effect(unnecessaryEffectGen)
  Fix 0: "Disable unnecessaryEffectGen for this line"
  Fix 1: "Disable unnecessaryEffectGen for entire file"
  Fix 2: "Remove the Effect.gen, and keep the body"

[D3] (16:3-18:5) TS377017: This Effect.gen contains a single return statement. effect(unnecessaryEffectGen)
  Fix 0: "Disable unnecessaryEffectGen for this line"
  Fix 1: "Disable unnecessaryEffectGen for entire file"
  Fix 2: "Remove the Effect.gen, and keep the body"

[D4] (22:3-24:5) TS377017: This Effect.gen contains a single return statement. effect(unnecessaryEffectGen)
  Fix 0: "Disable unnecessaryEffectGen for this line"
  Fix 1: "Disable unnecessaryEffectGen for entire file"
  Fix 2: "Remove the Effect.gen, and keep the body"

=== Quick Fix Application Results ===

=== [D1] Fix 0: "Disable effectFnOpportunity for this line" ===
skipped by default

=== [D1] Fix 1: "Disable effectFnOpportunity for entire file" ===
skipped by default

=== [D1] Fix 2: "Convert to Effect.fn (with span from withSpan)" ===

--- file:///.src/effectFnOpportunity_defaultConfig.ts ---
import * as Effect from "effect/Effect"

// With the default effectFn config (["span"]), only functions that end their
// pipe chain with Effect.withSpan should get the effectFnOpportunity diagnostic.
// Functions without withSpan should NOT get a diagnostic because no fix variant
// is config-enabled for them.

// SHOULD get diagnostic: pipe ends with Effect.withSpan
export const withSpanFunction = Effect.fn("withSpanFunction")(function* (n: number) {
    return yield* Effect.succeed(n);
});

// Should NOT get diagnostic: no pipe, no withSpan
export const basicGen = (n: number) =>
  Effect.gen(function*() {
    return yield* Effect.succeed(n)
  })

// Should NOT get diagnostic: pipe does not end with withSpan
export const pipeWithMap = (n: number) =>
  Effect.gen(function*() {
    return yield* Effect.succeed(n)
  }).pipe(Effect.map((x) => x + 1))


=== [D2] Fix 0: "Disable unnecessaryEffectGen for this line" ===
skipped by default

=== [D2] Fix 1: "Disable unnecessaryEffectGen for entire file" ===
skipped by default

=== [D2] Fix 2: "Remove the Effect.gen, and keep the body" ===

--- file:///.src/effectFnOpportunity_defaultConfig.ts ---
import * as Effect from "effect/Effect"

// With the default effectFn config (["span"]), only functions that end their
// pipe chain with Effect.withSpan should get the effectFnOpportunity diagnostic.
// Functions without withSpan should NOT get a diagnostic because no fix variant
// is config-enabled for them.

// SHOULD get diagnostic: pipe ends with Effect.withSpan
export const withSpanFunction = (n: number) => Effect.succeed(n).pipe(Effect.withSpan("withSpanFunction"))

// Should NOT get diagnostic: no pipe, no withSpan
export const basicGen = (n: number) =>
  Effect.gen(function*() {
    return yield* Effect.succeed(n)
  })

// Should NOT get diagnostic: pipe does not end with withSpan
export const pipeWithMap = (n: number) =>
  Effect.gen(function*() {
    return yield* Effect.succeed(n)
  }).pipe(Effect.map((x) => x + 1))


=== [D3] Fix 0: "Disable unnecessaryEffectGen for this line" ===
skipped by default

=== [D3] Fix 1: "Disable unnecessaryEffectGen for entire file" ===
skipped by default

=== [D3] Fix 2: "Remove the Effect.gen, and keep the body" ===

--- file:///.src/effectFnOpportunity_defaultConfig.ts ---
import * as Effect from "effect/Effect"

// With the default effectFn config (["span"]), only functions that end their
// pipe chain with Effect.withSpan should get the effectFnOpportunity diagnostic.
// Functions without withSpan should NOT get a diagnostic because no fix variant
// is config-enabled for them.

// SHOULD get diagnostic: pipe ends with Effect.withSpan
export const withSpanFunction = (n: number) =>
  Effect.gen(function*() {
    return yield* Effect.succeed(n)
  }).pipe(Effect.withSpan("withSpanFunction"))

// Should NOT get diagnostic: no pipe, no withSpan
export const basicGen = (n: number) => Effect.succeed(n)

// Should NOT get diagnostic: pipe does not end with withSpan
export const pipeWithMap = (n: number) =>
  Effect.gen(function*() {
    return yield* Effect.succeed(n)
  }).pipe(Effect.map((x) => x + 1))


=== [D4] Fix 0: "Disable unnecessaryEffectGen for this line" ===
skipped by default

=== [D4] Fix 1: "Disable unnecessaryEffectGen for entire file" ===
skipped by default

=== [D4] Fix 2: "Remove the Effect.gen, and keep the body" ===

--- file:///.src/effectFnOpportunity_defaultConfig.ts ---
import * as Effect from "effect/Effect"

// With the default effectFn config (["span"]), only functions that end their
// pipe chain with Effect.withSpan should get the effectFnOpportunity diagnostic.
// Functions without withSpan should NOT get a diagnostic because no fix variant
// is config-enabled for them.

// SHOULD get diagnostic: pipe ends with Effect.withSpan
export const withSpanFunction = (n: number) =>
  Effect.gen(function*() {
    return yield* Effect.succeed(n)
  }).pipe(Effect.withSpan("withSpanFunction"))

// Should NOT get diagnostic: no pipe, no withSpan
export const basicGen = (n: number) =>
  Effect.gen(function*() {
    return yield* Effect.succeed(n)
  })

// Should NOT get diagnostic: pipe does not end with withSpan
export const pipeWithMap = (n: number) => Effect.succeed(n).pipe(Effect.map((x) => x + 1))
